channel.title: Pattaya Gym Directory - Recently Added Venues
channel.description: Latest gyms, Muay Thai camps, dive operators, golf courses, and sport venues added to the Pattaya Gym Directory.

item.title: ALFA BJJ Pattaya
item.description: Pattaya’s first ever dedicated Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu gym. Standalone BJJ academy with Gi + No-Gi classes, all levels welcome. Pure-BJJ environment distinct from multi-discipline MMA gyms.

item.title: Sanit Sport Club
item.description: Two-zone Mabprachan club: comprehensive fitness centre + dedicated Muay Thai gym. 1,000+ members. Trainer Kru Rung — 40 years Lumpinee/Rajadamnern. Resident MAX Muay Thai champion Krasuk. 4 daily MT sessions.

item.title: Lumpinee Boxing Stadium (Bangkok day-trip)
item.description: World most prestigious Muay Thai stadium. ONE Lumpinee weekly Friday cards (12 bouts) + Fairtex Fight Saturday morning. Day-trip from Pattaya for serious MT students. Tickets ฿1500-4500.

item.title: Rajadamnern Stadium (Bangkok day-trip)
item.description: World first Muay Thai stadium, founded 1945. Almost nightly fight cards. RWS Rajadamnern World Series Saturday flagship (8 fights + free beers). Tickets ฿1,600-4,500. Pair with Lumpinee for canonical Bangkok MT weekend.

item.title: Coco Fitness
item.description: Central Pattaya commercial gym on the 4th floor of Mike Shopping Mall. Sea-view cardio, walk-in day passes, towel and locker included, and value monthly pricing.

item.title: Burapha Golf Club
item.description: 36 holes designed for natural beauty (lakes, hills, palms). Hosted 2010 Thailand Open. Top tournament venue.

item.title: Pickleball Pattaya
item.description: Pattaya's flagship dedicated pickleball facility on Pratumnak Soi 6. Two full-sized courts, paddles, balls, ball machine, strong lighting, and beginner lessons from an English-speaking licensed coach.

item.title: BOUNCE Pattaya — Trampoline Park
item.description: International trampoline park franchise on 6F Harbor Pattaya Mall. Free Jump arena, slam dunk lane, dodgeball, performance airbag, Mini BOUNCE for toddlers. BOUNCE FIT adult cardio classes. Same building as Deep Climbing + Bean Cow.

item.title: Royal Varuna Yacht Club
item.description: Thailand most prestigious yacht club, founded 60+ years ago. RYA-accredited sailing + powerboating training. World-class regattas (ILCA, OK Dinghy, Optimist, Dart, Hobie, Multihull). Pratamnak Hill clubhouse + pool + boat storage + beach bar.

item.title: Ocean Marina Jomtien — Southeast Asia Largest Marina
item.description: Southeast Asia largest marina. 455 wet berths + 100 trailer + 30 hardstand. Yachts up to 75m. Award-winning. Top of the Gulf Regatta host. SailBreeze sailing school on-site. Yacht charter + brokerage hub. Customs clearance for international yachts.

item.title: Pattaya Bike and Boat Tours
item.description: Guided bicycle + boat tour operator. Quiet back-road routes through real Thai villages, plantations, fishing communities. Small-group English-speaking tours. Bike rental also available. Naklua-based.

item.title: MAX Muay Thai Stadium Pattaya
item.description: Pattaya daily Muay Thai stadium near King Power on Sukhumvit Road. Tourist-friendly live fight cards, online ticketing, and current listings that vary between 19:00 and 19:45 starts by date.

item.title: Pattaya Beach Public Aerobics — Open-Air Free Fitness
item.description: FREE open-air group fitness on Pattaya Beach + Jomtien Beach boardwalks. Daily Zumba aerobics, dance fitness, yoga, tai chi, stretching. No fee, no signup. Genuine Thai cultural fitness phenomenon. Pattaya most underrated daily wellness routine.

item.title: Wong Amat Beach — Naklua Family Swimming Beach
item.description: Pattaya quietest, cleanest, most family-friendly main beach. ~4km long Naklua coastline with fenced safe-swim zone, beach volleyball court, jet ski + banana boat (central section). Walking distance to Centara Grand Mirage, Cape Dara, and Sanctuary of Truth. Free.

item.title: Big Buddha Hill (Wat Phra Yai) — Pratamnak Landmark
item.description: Pattaya iconic 18m golden Buddha at peak of Pratamnak Hill. Free entry. Accessed via 100+ step grand staircase (genuine cardio climb). 360 degree panoramic Pattaya Bay + Jomtien views. Sunrise/sunset photography. Active temple with resident monks. Dress code applies.

item.title: Koh Larn (Coral Island) — Pattaya Day-Trip Beach Island
item.description: Pattaya primary day-trip beach island. 30-min ferry from Bali Hai Pier. 6 beaches (Tawaen, Samae, Tien, Nual, Ta Yai, La). Parasailing, banana boats, jet ski, snorkeling, intro scuba, beach volleyball. Genuinely clearer water + whiter sand than mainland.

item.title: Pattaya Marriott Resort and Spa
item.description: 5-star Marriott Bonvoy beachfront resort on Na Jomtien Beach. Multiple outdoor pools, oceanfront fitness centre, Quan Spa (Marriott Asian-wellness signature), Kids Club, direct beach access. Asset World Corp operator.

item.title: Renaissance Pattaya Resort & Spa
item.description: 5-star Marriott Bonvoy Renaissance-brand beachfront resort, opened 2017. 257 rooms across 10 floors. 2 outdoor pools + kids pool + Kids Club + full-service spa + fitness centre. Modern design lifestyle brand. Na Jomtien beachfront.

item.title: Megabreak Pool Hall Pattaya
item.description: Pattaya’s most respected dedicated pool hall. Tournament-class 9-foot pool tables + snooker. Long-running expat institution on Soi Diana, central Pattaya. ฿200–฿400/hour walk-in.

item.title: Bangkok Hospital Pattaya — Sports Rehabilitation & Wellness
item.description: BDMS-network JCI-accredited international hospital. Rehabilitation Center for sports/orthopedic/neuro injuries. Prestige Wellness Anti-Aging Center with DNA fitness profiling and weight management. Medical anchor for Pattaya sport tourism.

item.title: Pattaya Floating Market — Muay Talay & Cultural Activities
item.description: Cultural-sport park on canals across 4 Thai regional zones. Live Muay Talay (water boxing on tree-trunk over canal) shows 3x daily. Rowboats, amphibious boats, water zipline, Thai dance. Distinctive Pattaya cultural-sport experience.

item.title: Sanctuary of Truth — Wood Temple & Cultural-Sport Park
item.description: Pattaya iconic 105m all-teak wood temple, hand-carved without nails since 1981, still under active construction. On-site activities: horseback riding, speed boat tours, traditional Thai water-skill performance, walking grounds. Naklua peninsula setting.

item.title: InterContinental Pattaya Resort
item.description: 5-star IHG hilltop resort. 3 outdoor pools incl. 25m lap pool, Amburaya Spa, 24-hour fitness, on-site tennis courts, sea-view Cliff restaurant. Pratamnak Hill — adjacent to Royal Cliff / Fitz Club / Pickleball Pattaya luxury cluster.

item.title: Holiday Inn Pattaya
item.description: 4-star Beach Road IHG. Two outdoor infinity pools (Bay Tower L4 + Executive Tower L6), modern fitness centre with Pattaya Bay views, Tea Tree Spa, Kids Club. Central beachfront family-friendly stay.

item.title: Anytime Fitness Pattaya
item.description: Global 24/7 gym franchise with 2 Pattaya locations. Key-fob access, worldwide reciprocity at 5,000+ clubs, no-contract memberships, 1-day free trial, personal training. Clean, predictable, female-friendly alternative to bro-gym Pattaya.

item.title: Dusit Thani Pattaya — Devarana Wellness
item.description: Iconic 5-star Thai-heritage resort since 1973. Devarana Wellness with cascading waterfall garden, fitness centre, traditional Thai massage, yoga, meditation, active stretching. Two oceanfront pools + two private beaches + tennis history.

item.title: Fairtex Training Center Pattaya
item.description: World's largest Muay Thai resort camp. 9 rings, 17 trainers, on-site hotel & 25m pool. Champions: Yodsanklai, Stamp, Smilla Sundell, Saemapetch.

item.title: Sityodtong Pattaya
item.description: Founded 1960 by Kru Yodtong. 57+ world champions including Samart Payakaroon. Trained Rob Kaman & Ramon Dekkers. Pilgrimage destination.

item.title: WKO Muay Thai & Fitness (ISS Gym)
item.description: Owner Sifu McInnes was first Westerner to ref Lumpinee (1993). Resident trainer Sakmongkol (231-20-4, 3x Lumpinee, 5x WMC). ~฿4,000/month.

item.title: Kombat Group Thailand
item.description: All-inclusive multi-discipline camp. Christian Daghio's legacy (190 MT fights, 7x World Champ). Muay Thai+Boxing+MMA+BJJ+Krav. 6 rings. 5/5 TripAdvisor.
